name: Palisade Sunday Farmers' Market

Products.value: Fresh produce and an ever-changing collection of handcrafted/artisan goods (baked goods, lavender, soaps, jewelry, juice, flowers), plus rotating food trucks and live music

notes: The on-file website (townofpalisade.org/departments/sunday-market-page) 301-redirects to the current official Town of Palisade page https://palisade.colorado.gov/sunday-farmers-market, which was used as the primary source. Address '3rd St. & Main St.' on file matches the official page's 'Third and Main Streets, Downtown Palisade' so no change made. On-file Facebook URL confirmed correct (embedded on the official page). Could not verify Email (a market@townofpalisade.org address surfaced in general web search but was not found stated on the official Town page or its contact-directory/contact-us pages, so omitted per source-quality rule), Instagram (only individual musical performers have Instagram links, not the market itself), SNAP/EBT acceptance, ADA accessibility, or Certified Organic status — none of these were clearly stated on the official site, so they were left out.
